verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Victory is mine, victory is mine, Victory today is mine. I told Satan, "Get Ye behind," Victory today is mine.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Joy is mine, joy is mine Joy today is mine I told Satan "Get Ye behind" Victory today is mine.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Happiness is mine, happiness is mine Happiness today is mine I told satan "Get Ye behind" Happiness today is mine

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Healing is mine, healing is mine Healing today is mine I told satan "Get Ye behind" Healing today is mine.
